figures.caption: Fig. 3: Top: Visualization of ten selected tasks in RoboTwin 2.0 Benchmarks. Bottom: Visualization of five selected tasks in ManiSkill 3 Benchmarks.
Fig. 4: Left: Architecture of Geometry Encoder. Mid: Efficacy of Multi-View Projection. Right: Impact of Modality Embeddings.

Fig. 2: Overall architecture of ReMAP-DP. The method consists of three components: (1) Back projection and re-projection are used to obtain RGB and point maps for workspace alignment and denoising. (2) A dual stream encoder and transformer is used to process RGB and geometric features and fuse them together. (3) An action generation module employs a 1D-UNet Diffusion Policy to predict precise robot actions conditioned on the fused multi-modal features.
Fig. 5: Real-World Experiments. Top: Real-World experiments setup, including cameras’ positions and robotic arms’ settings. Bottom: Objects used in tasks and their sizes.
